title: Fangs Of The Night - Alien Evo Addon
description: An addon for Alien Evolution that adds the Vladat species to the game
body:
![Fangs Of The Night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/845a6d1cc39840ee0e94698b09dc96161f6e9206.png)
How to unlock the Vladat Tranformation:

-Locate the ancient Cathedral found very rarely in Dark Oak Forests

-Open a once forgotten beast's resting place to reveal something they left behind

-Use it to let the Omnitrix scan and unlock the Vladat Transformation

And most importantly,
have fun :)

Recal Addon Compatability NOW ADDED

Dependencies:

-Palladium

-Geckolib

-KubeJS

-Architectury API

-Alien Evolution

-Pehkui

-Rhino
